title: Step S-SWQT-0009: Portal 骨架与 SSOT 同步管道

items.statement: 建立 examples/portal 与 packages/*/docs 的单向 SSOT 同步管道，使人类可在本地浏览 Overview 与核心约定页，且 CI 能检测文档漂移。

inScope: 新建 examples/portal（Vite + React + workspace 依赖 @swui/ui）。
全局 ThemeProvider + ThemeControl toolbar（theme/density 上下文，对齐 R-SWUI-001 交付）。
outOfScope: 修改 @swui/ui 公共 API 或 tarball 内容结构。

items.researchEvidence: R-SWUI-002 §9.2 建议落点；§12 风险 #1 docs 漂移缓解。

items.problemDefinition: 约定文档仅存在于 packages 内，无独立人类浏览入口，且缺少构建时同步机制。
items.requirementsDefinition: portal dev/build 成功；约定页内容与 SSOT 一致；sync-docs --check 在 drift 时 exit 非零。
items.plainLanguage: 先有一个能打开的、内容与 npm 包 docs 同步的约定站骨架。
items.firstSlice: bun run sync-docs && cd examples/portal && bun run dev → 可见 ADOPTION 同步内容。

readiness.reason: R-SWUI-002 §13 决策已确认；Vite/React 与 docs SSOT 路径明确。

items.summary: Added examples/portal Vite/React app with sync-docs SSOT pipeline, convention markdown routes, ThemeControl toolbar, and root portal scripts.
items.result: Portal dev/build succeeds; SSOT docs sync to .generated/; Playwright convention routes pass in light/dark.

cases.name: Maintainer browses synced convention docs
cases.evidence: bun run portal:dev serves /conventions/* from .generated/ after sync-docs.

cases.name: CI detects SSOT drift
cases.evidence: sync-docs:check exits non-zero when .generated/ differs from SSOT.

gateOutcomes.evidence: Portal skeleton only; docs copied one-way from packages/ui SSOT; no @swui/ui API changes.
sync-docs unit tests pass; portal build succeeds; Playwright covers Overview and convention routes.
sync-docs and sync-docs:check scripts encoded in package.json and CI.

items.validationSummary: Portal build, sync-docs unit tests, Playwright convention routes pass
items.rootMount: Yes - layout v3 stable Step path; no physical archive move.
items.hardPromotionGateSummary: minimum auto-filled by workflow promote; validationSummary provided.
items.testCaseSummary: Portal build, sync-docs unit tests, Playwright convention routes pass

items.minimumSetSatisfied: Yes - workflow promote populated minimum registry/audit records before setting status=delivered.

requirementAudit.risk: Minimum auto-fill is less descriptive than a hand-authored Completion Audit.
requirementAudit.followUp: Review owner may enrich the audit before delivery when richer evidence is required.

items.intermediateDocumentStateAudit: delivered-registry-entry and completion-audit populated before final status=delivered.

closingSelfAudit.closingSelfAuditEvidence: Closing triad minimum: reviewed precondition satisfied; validationSummary present; registry/audit records populated before status=delivered.

validationSummary: Portal build, sync-docs unit tests, Playwright convention routes pass
